original_image_tags: A carbon copy of a typewritten document on thin paper. The text is faint and reversed (appearing as a mirror image) due to the carbon transfer process. The document appears to be a memorandum or report. The visible text, when reversed, reads:

elements.description: Three overlapping ink stamps: one stamped 'MR. JONES MAR 15 12 01 PM '53', one stamped 'RECEIVED F B I U S DEPT OF JUSTICE', and a red date stamp 'MAR 16 10 54 AM '53'.

judge.reason: Description A claims a mirrored carbon-copy document with no visible images, while Description B claims three overlapping ink stamps with specific verbatim text, representing completely different visual content.
